scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/index.js && bun build ./src/auth.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/auth.schema.js && bun build ./src/budget.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/budget.schema.js && bun build ./src/category.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/category.schema.js && bun build ./src/invoice.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/invoice.schema.js && bun build ./src/notification.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/notification.schema.js && bun build ./src/transaction.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/transaction.schema.js && bun build ./src/wallet.schema.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/wallet.schema.js
